CustomField.formula: IF(ISPICKVAL(HOMEtracker__Status__c,"Under Construction"),"Under Construction", IF(ISPICKVAL(HOMEtracker__Status__c,"Sale Pending/In Escrow"),"Sale Pending, No longer available for viewing", IF(ISPICKVAL(HOMEtracker__Status__c,"Available For Rent - Immediate Occupancy"),"Immediate Occupancy", IF(ISPICKVAL(HOMEtracker__Status__c,"Available For Rent - Vacancy in Next 30-60 Days"),"Vacancy in Next 30-60 Days", IF(ISPICKVAL(HOMEtracker__Status__c,"Rental Pending"),"Rental Pending","")))))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Status message to display in Profile Property Listing
CustomField.label: Status Message
